data.summary: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence regarding the rate limiting on auth endpoints.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aims to validate the behavior of rate limiting on auth endpoints, but there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates the implementation or testing of this feature. The linked use cases and prior steps do not address rate limiting specifically, leading to an inconclusive status. Without specific evidence or endpoints related to rate limiting, the requirement cannot be confirmed as satisfied.
gaps: No evidence of rate limiting implementation or validation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify rate limiting on auth endpoints.
